title: I swapped my mechanical keyboard for Turtle Beach’s new Hall effect, touchscreen-equipped TKL model — and its smooth typing and high customizability made me never want to go back
summary: Want a high-performing gaming keyboard with an integrated touchscreen for streaming and seamless customization? The Turtle Beach Command Series KB7 was released in May 2026 alongside the Command Series KB5 — a full-sized keyboard with a smaller touchscreen and mechanical switches.
caption: output/2026-07-21/i-swapped-my-mechanical-keyboard-for-turtle-beach-s-new-hall-effect-to.txt
